context.projectOverview: Sprint 9 ships the disk-marker checkpoint mechanism (production-friendly async approval via .bober/approvals/) + bober approve/reject/list-approvals CLI subcommands. Clones Sprint 8 patterns. Must NOT change pipeline default behavior (noop stays default until Sprint 14).

completedSprints.title: CLI blocking mechanism — pattern to clone

notes: COLOCATION HARD CONSTRAINT — contract says tests/orchestrator/checkpoints/disk.test.ts but Sprints 5/7/8 set the precedent: tests COLOCATED. Disk mechanism test → src/orchestrator/checkpoints/mechanisms/disk.test.ts. CLI command tests → src/cli/commands/<command>.test.ts. Briefing has the full plan including state file design, polling cleanup pattern, race handling, 100ms write budget enforcement (artifact summary, not full content).
